app.name: Barasira
app.tagline: Access trusted service providers located near you in Mali 🇲🇱

home.heroTitle: Access trusted service providers located near you in Mali 🇲🇱
home.heroSubtitle:
Plumbing, electricity, transport, tailoring… in just a few minutes.
Barasira connects individuals and professionals in Mali for fast, reliable, and local services.
home.serviceFound: A service found in just a few minutes
home.description: Find local professionals, post your needs, and communicate easily on a platform designed for Mali.
home.availableCities: Available in several cities across Mali

search.placeholder: Which service are you looking for?

how.title: Get your needs handled in three steps
how.description: From search to first contact, Barasira supports you without complexity.
how.step1Description: Search for a service or post a detailed mission in minutes.
how.step2Description: Review providers' skills, prices, and information.
how.step3Description: Chat through Barasira messaging and organize the intervention.

coverage.title: Services near you
coverage.description: Explore covered cities and easily find an available professional in your area.

finalCta.title: Turn your need into a solution.
finalCta.description: Join Barasira and find the professional you need.

footer.description: The Malian platform connecting clients with trusted professionals for simple, local, and efficient services.
footer.helpDescription: Our team can help with your missions, your account, and using Barasira.
footer.backToTop: Back to the top of the page

auth.verify_email_text: A verification link has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
auth.forgot_password_text: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.

client.subtitle: Track your requests, conversations, and mission progress from one place.
client.empty: You have not created a mission yet.

provider.subtitle: Manage your services, applications, and assigned missions.
provider.noAssigned: No mission is currently assigned to you.
provider.noAvailable: No new mission currently matches your services.

validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after the start date.

translation.title: Translation
translation.description: Translate the content, then apply the desired version.

form.needDescription: Clearly present the service you need.
form.title: Mission title
form.titlePlaceholder: E.g. Repair a leak under the sink
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue, expected result, and useful constraints.
form.locationBudgetDescription: Specify where the mission takes place and your estimated budget.
form.addressAutocompleteHint: Start typing an address, then select a suggestion.
form.addressManualHint: Enter the address manually. Autocomplete requires a Google Maps key.
form.skillsQuestionsDescription: Help providers prepare a relevant proposal.
form.questionPlaceholder: E.g. Are you available this weekend?

createPage.title: Describe your need
createPage.subtitle: Post a clear request to receive suitable proposals.
createPage.draftRestored: Your previous draft was restored automatically.
createPage.aiTitle: Save time with an initial proposal
createPage.aiDescription: Describe your need freely. Dates already entered will be preserved.
createPage.aiLabel: Your need in a few words
createPage.aiPlaceholder: E.g. leak under the sink in Bamako, urgent intervention, budget 30,000 FCFA
createPage.statusNotice: Once published, your mission will be visible with the “Pending” status.
createPage.aiApplied: The AI proposal has been applied. Review it before publishing.
createPage.aiLimit: The generation limit has been reached. Try again later.
createPage.checkRequired: Check the required fields before publishing.
createPage.authenticationRequired: You must be logged in to create a mission.
createPage.emailVerificationRequired: You must verify your email address.
createPage.publishError: The mission could not be published.

editPage.subtitle: Update the information before the mission starts.

show.claimHint: Your availability will be checked before assignment.
show.validateHint: Confirm that the mission has been completed, then choose a secure payment method.
show.imagesReadOnlyHint: Photos added by the client when the mission was approved.
show.imagesHint: Select 1 to 5 images to display in the provider's completed missions.
show.imagesFormats: JPG, PNG or WebP · 5 MB maximum per image
show.assignProviderHint: All verified providers are listed. The selected provider receives an email and SMS with a 48-hour validation link.
show.invitationError: The invitation could not be sent.
show.unassignHint: The mission will return to pending and can be assigned to another provider.
show.unassignConfirm: Do you really want to unassign {provider} from this mission? It will return to pending and can be assigned to another provider.
show.unassignModalMessage: Do you really want to unassign {provider}? The mission will return to pending and can be offered to another provider.
show.unassignError: The provider could not be unassigned.

invitation.acceptError: This mission could not be accepted.

status.accepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
status.cancelled: This invitation was replaced or cancelled.

unassignmentForm.hint: Tell us why you want to unassign {provider}. This reason will be kept in the mission history.
unassignmentForm.detailsPlaceholder: Explain the reason for unassignment in a few sentences…
unassignmentForm.detailsRequired: Describe your reason using at least 10 characters.

reasons.unavailable: The provider is no longer available
reasons.disagreement: Disagreement about the terms or service

index.subtitle: Manage your requests, track their progress, and quickly find every service intervention.
index.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, description, or address...
index.noResultsDescription: Change or reset your filters to display other missions.
index.emptyDescription: Create your first mission and find the right provider for your needs.
index.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this mission?
index.cancelError: The mission could not be cancelled.
index.deleteError: The mission could not be deleted.

messages.claimed_success: The mission has been assigned to you.
messages.schedule_conflict: You already have a mission scheduled during this time slot.

reviews.title: Rate the provider
reviews.hint: Share your experience after the mission has been completed.
reviews.thankYou: Thank you for rating this provider.
reviews.ratingRequired: Choose a rating between 1 and 5 stars.
reviews.published: Thank you, your review has been published.
reviews.updated: Your review has been updated and is now final.
reviews.finalNotice: This review has already been edited and is now final.

platformReviews.title: What our users think about Barasira
platformReviews.homeTitle: They use Barasira and share their experience
platformReviews.homeSubtitle: Authentic feedback from clients and providers who bring the platform to life.
platformReviews.subtitle: Clients and providers freely share their experience of the platform.
platformReviews.placeholder: Tell us what you like and what we could improve…
platformReviews.loginText: Log in to publish an authentic review of Barasira.
platformReviews.empty: No reviews have been published yet. Be the first to share your experience.

messages.title: Messages
messages.mission_completed: This mission is complete. The conversation remains available to read, but no new messages can be sent.

profile.title: My profile
profile.personalInformationHint: The information used for your Barasira account.
profile.editHint: Keep your contact details and introduction up to date.
profile.emailHint: A new email address must be verified.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Introduce yourself in a few lines…
profile.photoHint: JPG, PNG or WebP — 3 MB maximum.
profile.photoTooLarge: The photo must not exceed 3 MB.
profile.photoInvalidType: Choose a JPG, PNG or WebP image.
profile.emptyBio: No introduction has been added yet.
profile.completedMissionsHint: Photos added by clients after the mission has been approved and paid.
profile.noCompletedMissions: No completed missions with photos yet.

providerCredentials.title: Education, experience and certifications
providerCredentials.hint: Complete your profile to help clients assess your skills.
providerCredentials.deleteMessage: This information will be permanently removed from your profile.

providerPublicCredentials.title: Provider background and qualifications
providerPublicCredentials.hint: View the education, experience and certifications provided by {provider}.
providerPublicCredentials.empty: This provider has not added their professional background yet.

serviceIndex.title: Find the right service for your needs.
serviceIndex.subtitle: Explore available providers, compare their offers, and contact them directly through Barasira.
serviceIndex.emptyText: Try another search or remove some filters.

serviceShow.exchangeSafelyHint: Use Barasira messaging to explain your needs and keep every exchange in one place.
serviceShow.clientOnlyContact: Only clients can contact this provider.

adminDashboard.welcome: Hello {name}, manage Barasira at a glance
adminDashboard.subtitle: Monitor users, services, and mission activity from one central workspace.

impersonation.active: You are viewing the platform as {name}.
impersonation.confirm: Sign in as {name} without a password?

adminUsers.title: Users
adminUsers.subtitle: Add, edit, and manage platform accounts.
adminUsers.createSubtitle: Create a new account and define its access level.
adminUsers.editSubtitle: Update this account's information and access.
adminUsers.passwordRequired: Set a secure password of at least 8 characters.
adminUsers.passwordOptional: Leave these fields empty to keep the current password.

adminServices.title: Services
adminServices.subtitle: Add and manage the offers available on the platform.
adminServices.createSubtitle: Assign a new offer to a provider.
adminServices.editSubtitle: Update the offer, location, and pricing.
adminServices.detailsHint: Set the provider, category, and service area.
adminServices.name: Service name
adminServices.pricingHint: Set the price range and offer availability.

adminPartners.title: Partners
adminPartners.subtitle: Manage partner companies and their public visibility.
adminPartners.formSubtitle: Enter company, main contact and Barasira visibility information.
adminPartners.companyHint: This information may be displayed publicly when the partner is published.
adminPartners.logoHint: PNG, JPG or WEBP — 2 MB maximum.
adminPartners.contactHint: These details remain private to administrators.
adminPartners.promotionHint: Schedule when this partner may appear at the top of the home page.
adminPartners.promotionRule: During each active period, Barasira displays up to two partners ranked by highest amount paid.

partners.title: Barasira partners
partners.subtitle: Discover the organizations helping develop reliable and accessible services in Mali.
partners.emptyText: Our future partners will soon be featured here.

sponsorship.title: Publish sponsored content on Barasira
sponsorship.subtitle: Introduce your business to our community with a plan suited to your campaign.
sponsorship.plansText: Select one plan, then email your request to the Barasira team.

week.name: One week
week.description: A short campaign for news or an event.

month.name: One month
month.description: A regular presence to grow your visibility.

quarter.name: Three months
quarter.description: Long-term visibility at the best rate.

sponsorship.formText: Enter your details. Our team will reply by email to confirm the content and dates.
sponsorship.messagePlaceholder: Describe the content to promote and your preferred dates…
sponsorship.consent: I agree that my information may be used to process this request.

adminLogs.title: System logs
adminLogs.subtitle: Review and manage updates, deletions and technical activity from a secure workspace.
adminLogs.unavailableHint: Check the file path and permissions. With Docker, PHP or Nginx may write to stdout; configure LOG_VIEWER_* to point to a mounted file.
adminLogs.emptyHint: The file exists but contains no lines to display.
adminLogs.notice: Access and purging are restricted to the super administrator.
adminLogs.purgeHint: This action applies to every accessible source.
adminLogs.purgePeriodConfirm: Permanently delete entries in the selected period?

cookies.title: Your cookie choices
cookies.description: Barasira uses necessary cookies to secure your session. With your permission, marketing cookies help us measure campaigns and promote our services.
cookies.settingsText: You can change your choice at any time from the footer.
cookies.necessaryText: Required for login, security and core website features.
cookies.marketingText: Measure visits and the effectiveness of Google and Meta campaigns.

providerDocuments.title: My supporting documents
providerDocuments.hint: Upload documents to this private area. Only you and authorized administrators can access them.
providerDocuments.badgeInfoText: The Verified profile badge will be added automatically once a Barasira administrator has reviewed and approved your identity document.
providerDocuments.label: Document name
providerDocuments.fileHint: PDF, JPG, PNG or WEBP — 10 MB maximum.
providerDocuments.fileTooLarge: This file is too large. Select a file no larger than 10 MB.
providerDocuments.deleteText: The file and its verification status will be permanently deleted.

adminDocuments.title: Document verification
adminDocuments.subtitle: Review private supporting documents submitted by providers.

hero.title: Contact the Barasira team
hero.description: Do you have a question about a mission, your account, a provider, or how the platform works? Our team is here to help.

information.label: Contact details
information.title: We are available to support you
information.description: Contact us directly or use the form. We will reply as soon as possible.
information.hours: Monday to Saturday, 8 a.m. to 6 p.m.

account.title: Already have an account?
account.description: Log in so we can identify and process your request more quickly.

form.label: Send a message
form.title: How can we help you?
form.description: Complete the form below and describe your request as precisely as possible.
form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your request in as much detail as possible...
form.consent: I agree that my information may be used to process my request.
form.success: Your message has been sent successfully. Our team will reply shortly.
form.error: Your message could not be sent. Please try again later.

direct.title: Email us directly
direct.description: Our team prioritizes requests related to active missions and account access.

validation.min_length: This field must contain at least {min} characters.

auth.loginHeroTitle: Log in and quickly find the right provider.
auth.loginHeroText: Access your missions, services, messages and personalized recommendations.
auth.loginEmailDivider: or log in with your email
auth.registerEmailDivider: or create an account with your email
auth.registerHeroTitle: Create your account and get started easily.
auth.registerHeroText: Publish services, find missions or contact reliable providers throughout Mali.
auth.seekService: I am looking for a service

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Your conversations with clients and providers
messages.select: Select a conversation to get started.
messages.recipientMissing: The recipient could not be found.

errors.notFoundTitle: This page seems to have disappeared.
errors.notFoundDescription: The address may be incorrect or the page may have moved. You can return home or view the previous page.
errors.forbiddenTitle: You do not have access to this page.
errors.forbiddenDescription: This section is reserved for another role or requires additional permissions. Check your account or return to your dashboard.

payments.proofDescription: Add between 1 and 5 images. They will appear on the provider’s profile after payment confirmation.
payments.imageFormats: JPG, PNG or WebP · Maximum 5 MB per image
payments.imageRequired: Add at least one image of the completed mission.
payments.validationNotice: Payment is validated only after secure confirmation from the gateway.
payments.confirmedText: The gateway has confirmed your payment.
payments.pendingText: The status will be updated when secure confirmation is received.
